wiki.summary: “sick” showcases Nettspend’s flow, while he raps over a Jerk-like instrumental, and talks about topics such as jewellery, women, guns, and cars. The Jerk-like instrumental, which was produced by frequent collaborators, CXO, consists of high-pitched plucks and pads, while sliding hard-hitting bass and fast-paced percussion fill out the rest. On February 12, 2026, Nettspend would release a promotional video on his secondary Instagram account, in which he would preview the track and reveal the announcement date of the album. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: “sick” showcases Nettspend’s flow, while he raps over a Jerk-like instrumental, and talks about topics such as jewellery, women, guns, and cars. The Jerk-like instrumental, which was produced by frequent collaborators, CXO, consists of high-pitched plucks and pads, while sliding hard-hitting bass and fast-paced percussion fill out the rest. On February 12, 2026, Nettspend would release a promotional video on his secondary Instagram account, in which he would preview the track and reveal the announcement date of the album. The track would release as the fifteenth track to Nettspend’s debut studio album, early life crisis, on March 6, 2026. Read more on Last.fm.
